name: tc-cov-above
description: The default coverage fixture shape — the prescribed consumer package layout `{package.json, src/**}`, scanned at `src/`. `src/router.ts` sits above a mid floor but below 100 (some branch arms untested), so it clears the mid floor and fails a 100 one. The flat, no-manifest shape is the named special case (exempt_cov, full_with_config).
